summary: Tested new 'Ver perfil' and 'Recepcion' buttons on Business Dashboard, and the new Reception page. Fixed a critical backend bug (missing SlotStatus import) that was causing 500 errors on availability endpoint. All features working correctly after fix.

fixed.issue: NameError: name 'SlotStatus' is not defined - missing import from schemas.booking
fixed.fix: Added 'from schemas.booking import SlotStatus' to imports

passed_tests: Dashboard shows 'Ver perfil' button with data-testid='view-profile-button' - PASSED
Dashboard shows 'Recepcion' button (coral color) with data-testid='reception-button' - PASSED
'Ver como cliente' button correctly removed from dashboard - PASSED
'Ver perfil' button navigates to /business/[slug] in same tab (not new tab) - PASSED
'Recepcion' button navigates to /business/reception - PASSED
Reception page loads with data-testid='reception-page' - PASSED
Reception page has service selector (data-testid='service-select-trigger') - PASSED
Reception page has worker selector (data-testid='worker-select-trigger') - PASSED
Reception page has calendar component - PASSED
Reception page has client name input (data-testid='client-name-input') - PASSED
Reception page has client phone input (data-testid='client-phone-input') - PASSED
Reception page has client email input (data-testid='client-email-input') - PASSED
Reception page has client notes input (data-testid='client-notes-input') - PASSED

User login works (cliente@bookvia.com / Test1234!) - PASSED
Health endpoint returns healthy - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: Backend refactoring in iteration 54 missed importing SlotStatus enum in bookings.py router - fixed by adding import from schemas.booking
All new UI components have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Reception page correctly implements skip_payment=true for walk-in appointments
seed_data_creation: Created test walk-in booking via Reception page for 'Test Walk-in Client' at 14:00
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tested new Reception page feature. The page allows business owners to create walk-in appointments with skip_payment=true. Fixed missing SlotStatus import in bookings.py router. All dashboard buttons ('Ver perfil', 'Recepcion') working correctly. Previous 'Ver como cliente' button has been replaced.

bug_fix_details.issue: 500 error when loading availability slots on Reception page
bug_fix_details.root_cause: SlotStatus enum was not imported in /app/backend/routers/bookings.py after refactoring
bug_fix_details.fix_applied: Added 'from schemas.booking import SlotStatus' to imports
bug_fix_details.verification: Availability endpoint now returns slots correctly, Reception page loads time slots
